name: senior-engineering-workflow
description: A rigorous evidence-driven workflow for non-trivial software engineering tasks.

interface.longDescription: Investigate, design, implement, and validate non-trivial software changes with explicit requirements, evidence, delegation, and completion criteria. Ships three tiered subagents: workflow-researcher (gpt-5.6-sol), workflow-reviewer (gpt-5.6-terra), and workflow-executor (gpt-5.6-luna).
defaultPrompt: Use $senior-engineering-workflow to handle this non-trivial engineering task.
Investigate this codebase and design a solution for this complex change.
Review this implementation for defects, security issues, and scope creep.
